abilities.name: Tumbling Tumble Stone
abilities.text:
Tumble Stones have a hard time rolling by themselves, but with the assistance of a friend, become a living bowling ball.

This ability can only be used if there is a friendly monster within 1" of the Tumble Stone who wants to be pushed.

Move the Tumble Stone who is getting pushed 8"+d6" in a straight line. The Tumble Stone will stop if it hits an enemy model or piece of Impassable Terrain.

Every monster who the Tumble Stone's base collides with takes d3 damage.
